description: Legal query addressed to ha-Rav ha-Gadol. Concerning the parnas Yaʿaqov ha-Yerushalmi who died and left behind 4 sons and a daughter. His inheritance included a codex of the ḥumash. Most of the continuation is fragmentary. Also involved in the case (as judges?) are Levi Ibn al-Quḍāʿī; Yehuda al-Dimashqī b. Sibāʿ; and Abū l-Faraj. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
